question: General docs search mixes unrelated pages. How do I restrict a quorum query to Stellar validator documentation?

golden.answer: Call search_docs_in_category with query quorum and category validators. Verify returned paths are in the validator area, inspect breadcrumbs/snippets, and then open the relevant page. Category restriction is adapter-side because the upstream hierarchy field is not a reliable facet; use only the operation's supported category values.
keyFacts: Uses the validators category to constrain the quorum search.
Checks the returned paths and follows the relevant result for full content.
avoid: Do NOT invent a category outside the operation's supported vocabulary.
Do NOT assume an upstream hierarchy facet performed the category restriction.
golden.notes: Behavioral docs-category case; result ordering and content are live.

sources.note: Fetch-verified local path exists and defines the exercised contract/workflow.

evidence: 2026-07-11 localhost:8787 search→execute probe observed: HTTP 200; a validators/quorum query returned envelope ok=true and validator-prefixed hits.
specs/stellar-docs.json exists and supports the behavioral golden.
Sibling sweep: reviewed existing battery cases sharing the exercised surface; no contradictory behavioral golden found.
